mapper.sql: id::text AS id, kind, status, applicant_name AS "applicantName", applicant_phone AS "applicantPhone", applicant_email AS "applicantEmail", target_id::text AS "targetId", target_name AS "targetName", room_id::text AS "roomId", room_name AS "roomName", session_id::text AS "sessionId", start_date AS "startDate", end_date AS "endDate", guests, request_memo AS "requestMemo", admin_memo AS "adminMemo", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reservation WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( kind, status, applicant_name, applicant_phone, applicant_email, user_id, target_id, target_name, room_id, room_name, session_id, start_date, end_date, guests, request_memo ) VALUES ( #{kind}, 'PENDING', #{applicantName}, #{applicantPhone}, #{applicantEmail}, ${userId}, ${targetId}, #{targetName}, ${roomId}, #{roomName}, ${sessionId}, #{startDate}::date, #{endDate}::date, #{guests}, #{requestMemo} ) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE reservation
status = #{status}, admin_memo = #{adminMemo},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE::timestamptz
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM reservation WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT FROM reservation ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
